MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-30-2020 IN 206, DEFENDANT IMCO PARKING, LLC'S MOTION TO CONTINUE RIAL PURSUANT TO STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES. MARK LIPTON, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF VIA COURT CALL. DANIEL PICKOLICK, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT VIA COURT CALL. THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 8/24/20 IS CONTINUED TO 2/8/21 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. ALL PRE-TRIAL, DISCOVERY AND MOTION DEADLINES WILL BE GOVERNED BY THE NEW TRIAL DATE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER THAT IS APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
